author: codex
scope: Reduced the remaining metric_claim unit_family=other tail with exact aliases and payload-gated context rules while preserving explicit holds for employment scale/date/rate ambiguity.

constraints.mutation_path: deterministic code changes plus bun packages/cli/src/cli.ts materialize

subagents.finding_summary: Found 98 current metric other records, recommended 61 safe moves and 37 holds. The implementation adopted the exact/count-rate/context-safe subset, pulled back employment-scale and individuals aliases, and left the policy-held tail unresolved.

context_gated_rules: billions maps to money scale 1000000000 only when payload proves funding/relief/federal context
Uillions maps to money scale 1000000 only for finance metric names such as gross_subsidies
crossings per hour maps to pedestrians_per_hour only for pedestrian_crossings metrics
daily crossings maps to vehicle_crossings_per_day only with MTA Bridges and Tunnels context
per 1M riders maps to felonies_per_million_riders only for major_felonies metrics
weekends maps to count only when metric_name proves count or above-baseline-count context
year maps to years/duration only for agreement/license term payloads
x maps to multiple/ratio only for market_share_change
held_by_policy_or_ambiguity: malformed agent text: million dollars... wait, the table shows amounts in millions. Let me re-read.

verification.focused_tests: bun test packages/pipeline/test/ontology/normalizers.test.ts: 276 pass, 0 fail, 4567 expect() calls
verification.materialize: bun packages/cli/src/cli.ts materialize completed; Materialized 93092/98102 submissions; retired skipped 243; SQLite FTS quick_check ok
verification.validate: bun packages/cli/src/cli.ts validate: Issues 0; submissions 98102; canonical records 84040; wiki pages 7334

remaining_lanes: Metric other tail now 37; largest remaining bucket is employment/job scale policy at 25 records including thousands, Millions of jobs, and thousand jobs.
Remaining date/rate units require policy or more payload-specific rules: year date fields, generic rate rows, seats per car, days per employee, 2027 $M, and malformed agent text.
Continue the post-ingest cleanup loop on the next highest measurable bucket rather than broad audit paperwork.
